name: Old-Fashioned Macaroni and Cheese
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Macaroni, cooked & drained (to make 2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter or margarine over low heat.
2. Stir in flour and remove from heat.
3. Add milk, stirring constantly. Return to stovetop and cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture is thickened.
4. Stir in cheese and continue cooking until the cheese is melted.
5. Pour the milk and cheese mixture over the macaroni and mix well.
6. Transfer to a lightly greased baking dish.
7. Mix bread crumbs with 1 tablespoon of melted butter or margarine.
8. Sprinkle the bread crumb mixture evenly on top.
9. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°F until the top is golden brown.
